footer.tagline: Your #1 choice for English books in Germany

meta.title: Buy English Books in Germany | EnglischBuecher.de
meta.description: Discover and buy English books in Germany. Fiction, children’s books, exam prep and more. Delivery and Click & Collect available.

seo.p1: EnglischBuecher.de is an online bookstore dedicated to readers looking for English books in Germany. We offer a curated selection of fiction, non-fiction, children’s books, and learning materials.
seo.p2: Whether you are preparing for exams, improving your English skills, or simply enjoying books in English, our catalog includes popular titles, new arrivals, and category-based collections.
seo.p3: Customers across Germany benefit from reliable delivery as well as Click & Collect. Browse by category, discover bestsellers, and explore books from established and emerging authors.

banner_subtitle: Discover our wide range of English and German books!
error_fetching_data: Error fetching data. Please try again later.

imprint.title: Imprint / Legal Notice
imprint.responsible: Person responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
imprint.disclaimer_text: Despite careful control of the content, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us.
privacy.cookies_text: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience and to analyse the use of our website.
privacy.analytics: Used with IP anonymisation and opt-out possibility.
privacy.payment: Processed exclusively via certified payment providers (Stripe, PayPal, etc.).
privacy.rights_text: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and to object. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy.security_text: We use technical and organisational security measures to protect your data against manipulation, loss, destruction or unauthorised access.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.scope_text: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all orders placed through englischbuecher.de, operated by Shelly Biswal, Im Schwalg 60, 55411 Bingen, Germany. By placing an order, you accept these terms.
terms.contract_text: The presentation of products on our website does not constitute a binding offer. By clicking "Buy Now" and completing checkout, you submit a binding offer to purchase. We confirm receipt of your order by email; a binding contract is formed once we send a separate order confirmation or ship the goods.
terms.prices_text: All prices shown are final prices in Euro (€) and do not include statutory VAT, as we operate under the German small business regulation (§19 UStG). Shipping costs are shown separately during checkout before you confirm your order. Payment is processed securely via Stripe (credit/debit card) or PayPal.
terms.shipping_text: We currently ship within Germany via DPD. Estimated delivery times are shown at checkout and on our Shipping page. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery of the goods to the carrier.
terms.payment_text: Payment is due immediately upon placing your order. We accept payment via credit card, debit card, and PayPal through our secure payment provider Stripe. Your order will only be processed once payment has been successfully confirmed.
terms.revocation_text: As a consumer, you have a statutory right to withdraw from this contract within 14 days without giving any reason. Full details are provided on our Revocation page.
terms.warranty_text: We are liable for material defects in accordance with the applicable statutory provisions, in particular §§ 434 et seq. BGB. If goods are delivered damaged or defective, please contact us at admin@englischbuecher.de.
terms.liability_text: We are liable without limitation for damages arising from injury to life, body, or health caused by an intentional or negligent breach of duty, and for damages arising from the breach of essential contractual obligations (cardinal obligations). In all other cases, our liability is limited to foreseeable, contract-typical damage.
terms.law_text: These terms are governed by German law, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. For consumers, statutory consumer protection provisions of the country of residence remain unaffected.

revocation.title: Right of Withdrawal
revocation.right_text: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within 14 days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period is 14 days from the day on which you, or a third party named by you who is not the carrier, took possession of the last goods. To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us (contact details below) of your decision to withdraw from this contract by means of a clear statement (e.g. a letter sent by post or an email). You can use the model withdrawal form below, but it is not mandatory.
revocation.consequences_text: If you withdraw from this contract, we will reimburse all payments received from you, including delivery costs (except for additional costs resulting from your choice of a delivery method other than the cheapest standard delivery offered by us), without undue delay and at the latest within 14 days from the day on which we receive notice of your withdrawal. We will use the same payment method you used for the original transaction, unless expressly agreed otherwise; under no circumstances will you be charged fees for this reimbursement. We may withhold reimbursement until we have received the goods back, or until you have supplied evidence of having sent back the goods, whichever is earliest. You must send back the goods without undue delay and in any event no later than 14 days from the day on which you communicate your withdrawal. You will bear the direct cost of returning the goods.
revocation.form_text: If you wish to withdraw from the contract, please fill out this form and send it to us:
revocation.end: (I/we) hereby give notice that (I/we) withdraw from my/our contract of sale of the following goods, ordered on (date), received on (date). Name of consumer(s), address of consumer(s), signature (only if this form is notified on paper), date.

shipping.title: Shipping Information

methods.title: Shipping Method
methods.dpd: We ship all orders within Germany via DPD (typically 2–4 business days).

costs.title: Shipping Costs
costs.description: Shipping costs are calculated automatically at checkout based on package weight and your delivery address. Orders over €40 qualify for free shipping. The exact cost is always shown before you confirm your order.

shipping.checkout_note: All shipping costs are calculated transparently at checkout — no hidden fees.

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.text: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number by email so you can follow your package's journey with DPD.

international.title: International Shipping
international.text: We currently only ship within Germany. We're working on expanding to other EU countries — check back soon!

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your #1 destination for English books in Germany & Europe

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We make high-quality English-language literature easily accessible to readers in Germany and across Europe — fast, affordable, and with outstanding service.

story.title: Our Story
story.text1: Founded in 2024 out of pure passion for English books, because we ourselves spent years searching for great titles in Germany — often in vain.
story.text2: Today we ship hundreds of books every day to happy customers in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, and throughout the entire EU.

values.title: Our Values
values.quality_text: Only hand-picked, current, and original English editions.
values.service_text: Lightning-fast responses, personal advice, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
values.speed_text: Orders placed before 2 PM ship the same day.

team.title: The Team Behind Your Englisch Bücher
team.text: A small, passionate team of book lovers, language enthusiasts, and logistics pros.
team.contact: Feel free to write to us:

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.subtitle: We’re here for you — reply by email within 24 hours

form.title: Send us a Message
form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject
form.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: Everything you need at a glance

items.question: How long does shipping take?
items.answer: Orders placed before 2 PM ship the same day. Delivery within Germany takes 1–2 business days via DHL.

items.question: Can I order from outside Germany?
items.answer: Yes! We ship to all EU countries, Switzerland, UK, Norway and many more.

items.question: Are the books original English editions?
items.answer: 100% yes — all books are original UK/US editions, never translated versions.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: PayPal, credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna (invoice & instalments), and bank transfer.

items.question: How do I return a book?
items.answer: You have 30 days to return anything, free of charge. Just write to support and we’ll send you a return label.

items.question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
items.answer: Yes! You can add gift wrapping and a personal message at checkout.

items.question: Are prices including German VAT?
items.answer: Yes — all prices include 7% German VAT (books rate). VAT is deducted automatically for B2B customers in other EU countries.

items.question: Can I track my order?
items.answer: Absolutely! You receive a DHL tracking link as soon as your order ships.

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.subtitle: Not happy with your order? Here's how returns work.

1.title: Contact us
1.text: Email admin@englischbuecher.de within 14 days of receiving your order, including your order number.

2.title: Pack the item
2.text: Pack the book(s) securely in their original or similar packaging, in unused, resaleable condition.

3.title: Send it back
3.text: We'll send you the return address. Ship the package back to us using a trackable shipping method.

4.title: Get refunded
4.text: Once we receive and inspect the return, we'll process your refund within 14 days to your original payment method.

info.title: Good to know
info.condition: Books must be returned in their original, unused condition to be eligible for a refund.
info.cost: Return shipping costs are covered by the customer, unless the item arrived damaged or incorrect.
info.damaged: If your order arrived damaged or you received the wrong item, contact us immediately — we'll cover all costs and arrange a replacement or refund.
info.timeframe: You have 14 days from receiving your order to initiate a return, in line with German consumer protection law.
